line.issue: QuickCheck\Property::check(): Implicitly marking parameter $seed as nullable is deprecated, the explicit nullable type must be used instead

QuickCheck\Generator::arraysOf(): Implicitly marking parameter $max as nullable is deprecated, the explicit nullable type must be used instead

QuickCheck\Generator::intoArrays(): Implicitly marking parameter $max as nullable is deprecated, the explicit nullable type must be used instead
QuickCheck\PHPUnit\PropertyConstraint::__construct(): Implicitly marking parameter $seed as nullable is deprecated, the explicit nullable type must be used instead
QuickCheck\PHPUnit\PropertyConstraint::check(): Implicitly marking parameter $seed as nullable is deprecated, the explicit nullable type must be used instead
